notes: All 9 declarations are axiom-clean and characteristic-free; the file packages the irreducible Silverman III.6.2(c) residual as `DualAddMulByIntResidual` and wires it into the Route-C `htrace_dual` consumer via `RouteCTheoremOfSquareDiv.kappaDivisor_add_linEquiv` (Miller/Abel, char-free). Four of the seven theorems are unused within the file itself (exposed as external API or equivalence certifiers). No sorries, no heartbeat overrides.
